metadata.description: Laravel-specific workflow toolkit for Claude Code — V2-MVP shipped 2026-05-15

plugins.name: laravel-superpowers
plugins.description: 6 specialist agents (Livewire 4 / Pest 4 / Flux Pro v2 / architect / reviewer / best-practices), 6 enforcement hooks (banned-token / no-Claude-attribution / teamcity-always / anti-silent-deferral / visual-companion / brainstorm-T1-audit), 4 skills with stack-specific depth, config foundation, status slash command.
